name: oxlint
description: A high performance linter for the Oxidation Compiler

name: -c
--config
options.description: Path to Oxlint JSON configuration file

name: --tsconfig
options.description: Path to tsconfig.json path for reading path aliases and project references for import plugin

name: --ignore-path
options.description: Specify the file to use as your .eslintignore

name: --ignore-pattern
options.description: Specify file patterns to ignore (in addition to those in .eslintignore)

name: --no-ignore
options.description: Disable exluding of files from .eslintignore files, --ignore-path, and --ignore-pattern

name: --symlinks
options.description: Follow symlinks when linting, which are ignored by default

name: --jsdoc-plugin
options.description: Enable the JSDoc plugin

name: --jest-plugin
options.description: Enable the Jest plugin

name: --vitest-plugin
options.description: Enable the Vitest plugin

name: --nextjs-plugin
options.description: Enable the Next.js plugin

name: --react-perf-plugin
options.description: Enable the React Performance plugin

name: --promise-plugin
options.description: Enable the Promise plugin

name: --disable-react-plugin
options.description: Disable the React plugin, which is turned on by default

name: --disable-unicorn-plugin
options.description: Disable the Unicorn plugin, which is turned on by default

name: --disable-oxc-plugin
options.description: Disable the Oxc plugin, which is turned on by default

name: --disable-typescript-plugin
options.description: Disable the TypeScript plugin, which is turned on by default

name: --disable-import-plugin
options.description: Disable the Import plugin, which is turned on by default

name: -D
--deny
options.description: Deny a lint rule or category (enable a lint as an error)

generators.js_source:
async custom(i,e){let o;if(i.length&&i[0].startsWith("npx")){let t=await e({command:"npx",args:["oxlint","--rules"]});if(t.status!==0)return[];o=t.stdout}else{if((await e({command:"which",args:["oxlint"]})).status!==0)return[];o=(await e({command:"oxlint",args:["--rules"]})).stdout}return o.split(`
`).map(t=>t.trim()).filter(t=>t.startsWith("| ")).map(t=>t.split("|").map(n=>n.trim())).filter(t=>{if(t.length<3)return!1;let n=t[1].charCodeAt(0);return n>=97&&n<=122}).map(t=>{let[,n,l,c]=t,p=c!="";return{name:n,description:`${l} plugin`+(p?" (enabled by default)":""),icon:m}})}

name: -W
--warn
options.description: Warn about a lint rule or category (enable a lint as a warning)

generators.js_source:
async custom(i,e){let o;if(i.length&&i[0].startsWith("npx")){let t=await e({command:"npx",args:["oxlint","--rules"]});if(t.status!==0)return[];o=t.stdout}else{if((await e({command:"which",args:["oxlint"]})).status!==0)return[];o=(await e({command:"oxlint",args:["--rules"]})).stdout}return o.split(`
`).map(t=>t.trim()).filter(t=>t.startsWith("| ")).map(t=>t.split("|").map(n=>n.trim())).filter(t=>{if(t.length<3)return!1;let n=t[1].charCodeAt(0);return n>=97&&n<=122}).map(t=>{let[,n,l,c]=t,p=c!="";return{name:n,description:`${l} plugin`+(p?" (enabled by default)":""),icon:m}})}

name: -A
--allow
options.description: Allow a lint rule or category (suppress a lint)

generators.js_source:
async custom(i,e){let o;if(i.length&&i[0].startsWith("npx")){let t=await e({command:"npx",args:["oxlint","--rules"]});if(t.status!==0)return[];o=t.stdout}else{if((await e({command:"which",args:["oxlint"]})).status!==0)return[];o=(await e({command:"oxlint",args:["--rules"]})).stdout}return o.split(`
`).map(t=>t.trim()).filter(t=>t.startsWith("| ")).map(t=>t.split("|").map(n=>n.trim())).filter(t=>{if(t.length<3)return!1;let n=t[1].charCodeAt(0);return n>=97&&n<=122}).map(t=>{let[,n,l,c]=t,p=c!="";return{name:n,description:`${l} plugin`+(p?" (enabled by default)":""),icon:m}})}

name: --fix
options.description: Fix as many issues as possible. Only unfixed issues are reported in the output

name: --silent
options.description: Do not display any diagnostics

name: --deny-warnings
options.description: Exit with a non-zero code if there are any warnings

name: --max-warnings
options.description: Exit with a non-zero code if there are more than `max` warnings

name: -f
--format
options.description: Use a specific output format

name: --threads
options.description: Number of threads to use. Set to 1 to use only 1 CPU core

name: --rules
options.description: List all available rules

name: -h
--help
options.description: Show help

name: -V
--version
options.description: Show version
